I AM THE CHANGE
Scholarship Program - Home Visit Questionnaire
Team Everest | Confidential

**Volunteer Name:** Dhiya Bharathi  
**Co-Volunteer Name:** Janani  
**Date of Visit:** 20/06/26  

### Section 1 — Student Profile  
**1.1 Application ID:** TEMP - 2026 - 8975  
**1.2 Student Full Name:** Naveen PN M  
**1.3 Gender:** Male  

### Section 2 — Family Background  
**2.1 Family Status:** Having both parents  
**2.2 Relationship Details — Year of Death / Separation:**  
**2.2 Relationship Details — Reason for Death / Separation:**  
**2.3 Is Father/Mother photograph kept at home?** No  
**2.4 Government ID Verified:** Driving Licence  

| Name          | Age      | Education   | Occupation  | Annual Income                |
|---------------|----------|-------------|-------------|------------------------------|
| MANIVANNAN - G | 43 yrs. | +2 Fail     | Auto Driver  | 15000/month.                 |
| Bhanalakshmi - M | 37 yrs. | 10th pass. | Tailor      | Daily wages ~ 150/daily.    |
| Aarthi - M      | 16 yrs. | +1 class    | Student     |                              |
| Azhardian - M   | 8 yrs.  | 4th Std.    | Student.    |                              |

### Section 3 — Housing Condition

**3.6 Kitchen Type — Hall with Kitchen:** ✓  

### Section 4 — Financial Background  
**4.1 Assets at Home (tick all that apply)**  
**

--- Page 3 ---

4.1 Assets at Home — Washing Machine:** ✗  
**4.1 Assets at Home — Fridge:** ✓  
**4.1 Assets at Home — AC:** ✓  
**4.1 Assets at Home — LED TV:** ✓  
**4.1 Assets at Home — Two-Wheeler:** ✗  
**4.1 Assets at Home — Car:** ✗

**4.1 Assets at Home — Separate Wi-Fi:** ✗  
**4.1 Assets at Home — Others:**  
**4.2 Amount of Last Electricity Bill:** Rs. 2200/  
**4.3 Do you own any other assets/properties in the name of grandparents, parents, or student?** No  
**

--- Page 4 ---

4.4 Apart from your job, is there any other source of income?** No  
**4.5 Income Type:** Daily  
**4.6 Do you have any loans?** Yes  
**4.6.1 If yes, share Loan Purpose, Amount Taken, and Pending Loan Amount — Row 1 — Loan Purpose:** Auto  
**4.6.1 If yes, share Loan Purpose, Amount Taken, and Pending Loan Amount — Row 1 — Loan Amount Taken:** 1,500,000  
**4.6.1 If yes, share Loan Purpose, Amount Taken, and Pending Loan Amount — Row 1 — Pending Loan Amount:** Based on Due payment  
**

--- Page 5 ---

4.7 If you choose any college, how much is the college fee?** overall around 2 lakhs including transportation.  
**4.8 If the college fee is higher, how will you manage it?** No other source except taking money on interest.  
**4.9 If you do not receive this scholarship, how will you pay the fees?** Education loan per student home.  

### Section 5 — Health Information  
**5.1 Does the student have any health issues?** No  
**5.2 If yes, list the health issues:**  

### Section 6 — Student Commitment  
**6.1 Will you study college for three years without any obstacle?** Yes  
**6.2 If we have a training program within 15 km from your home, can you come?** Yes  
**6.3 Are you ready to send your son/daughter to weekly skill development classes on Sundays (16 classes a year)?** Yes  

### Section 7 — Scholarship Information  
**

--- Page 6 ---

7.1 Has the student received or applied for any other scholarships for their UG degree?** No.  

### Section 8 — Volunteer Observation  
**8.1 What is your opinion about the student, their family members, and their living condition?** Living in a house with damaged tiled roof & three girl children to support further - with a limited resource is hardly manageable. As the eldest, if Naveen gets supported with this scholarship, it would not only help him but enables the support to his whole family's children’s future.  
**8.2 Will you recommend this student for this scholarship?** Yes  
**8.3 Any other comments you want to share?**
